case_title: PATRICK LEE VS. ALAN DARRELL LITZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITZ, ALAN DARRELL D/B/A CFI INSURANCE AGENCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 393 7TH AVENUE, STE. 201-202, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
FILING FEE PAID ON ORDER PERMITTING ENTRY OF COPY OF RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LITZ, ALAN DARRELL D/B/A CFI INSURANCE AGENCY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT LITZ, ALAN DARRELL D/B/A CFI INSURANCE AGENCY DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK SERVED MAY-11-2005, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK SERVED MAY-11-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LITZ, ALAN DARRELL D/B/A CFI INSURANCE AGENCY

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $439.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LITZ, ALAN DARRELL D/B/A CFI INSURANCE AGENCY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITZ, ALAN DARRELL D/B/A CFI INSURANCE AGENCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON JUN-8-05 $2,000.00 RENT, $690.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $439.30 COSTS, $1,599.84 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,729.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
